description_long: This house features a rectangular, two-story structure with a flat roof and a weathered concrete exterior. The front facade is characterized by two large red-framed windows on the upper floor, a wooden balcony with a green metal railing, and a single red door below. Wooden beams protrude from beneath the roofline, adding a rustic touch to the otherwise utilitarian design. The side and rear walls are mostly unadorned, with the rear showing a plain surface and the side featuring two rectangular window openings. The balcony extends along the front and partially wraps around the side, providing outdoor space for the upper floor. The overall appearance suggests an urban, possibly older residential building with minimal decorative elements.
description: A two-story, flat-roofed house with a weathered concrete exterior, red-framed windows, and a wooden balcony with green railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large red-framed windows, a wooden balcony with green railing, and a red entry door below.
description_view_1: Angled front-side view highlighting the balcony wrapping around the side and the protruding wooden beams under the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain concrete wall with two rectangular window openings and no balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite rear-side view showing the same plain wall and window openings, with a partial view of the balcony on the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, asymmetrical on side and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Simple red door at ground level with no steps or porch, directly beneath the balcony, minimal decorative elements
